Count Installed Packages in Each Library Path

Source: R/count_packages.R
count_packages_in_libpaths.Rd

Enumerate all .libPaths() and count the number of installed packages in each directory.

Usage

count_packages_in_libpaths()

Value

A data.frame with columns Library_Path and Package_Count, including a total row.

See also

Other inspect: check_na(), check_size(), check_system(), lv()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
count_packages_in_libpaths()
} # }
